productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Grey Black Shoe
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these fashionable high ankle leather boots from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe for those days at the lounge. Upper Leather upper with a fabric collar for a comfortable Fit and stylish look Padded tongue with a leather upper and fabric lining for a comfortable and breathable wear Lace-up system combined with adjustable midfoot buckles for a perfect, customised fit Zippered medial ankle for an added comfort wear High ankle for better support to the lower leg Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Complete inner fabric lining for breathable comfort Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort and sweat protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with circular grooves throughout for maximum grip and traction shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
